Onimix Tech Courses 2026 • by Ahm7xMakki • All courses are for educational purposes
API Documentation REST • v1
Base URL
Endpoint
GET /api/courses

Returns all courses as JSON. Optionally filter by search query.

q string optional — Search/filter by course name
Example — All courses
Example — Search
Response shape
{ "success": true, "title": "Onimix Tech Courses 2026", "total": 17, "count": 17, "courses": [ { "id": 1, "name": "🎉 YouTube Automation Course By Huzaifa ❤", "url": "https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/..." }, ... ] }
JavaScript fetch example
